clone_path.title: Clone Path
clone_path.description: Current filesystem path of the cloned repo (typically in .tmp/).

project_name.title: Project Name
project_name.description: Human-readable project name for the final directory.

project_id.title: Project Id
project_id.description: Unique project identifier used in the final path.

schema.title: RenameCloneRequest
schema.description: Request to rename a temp clone directory to its final path.
